name: JUJUTSU KAISEN RPG [REMAKE]
description:
JUJUTSU KAISEN: Cursed Energy Awakening RPG [OVER 100K TOKEN LOREBOOK - COMPLETE REMAKE]

THE 8K TOKEN SORCERER SIMULATION | NOW WITH 100,000 TOKEN LOREBOOK

Cursed spirits rise from humanity's darkest emotions. Will you exorcise them—or become one? Welcome to the platform's most authentic Jujutsu Kaisen RPG, completely remade with over 7500 permanent tokens of visceral mechanics and a brand new 100,000 TOKEN LOREBOOK covering every curse, technique, domain, and character from Gege Akutami's masterpiece! Plunge into post-Shibuya chaos where Gojo Satoru remains sealed, curse users run rampant, and jujutsu society teeters on collapse.

You will navigate Tokyo Jujutsu High's shattered hierarchy, Kyoto's traditional stronghold, and curse-infested urban hellscapes from Shibuya to rural shrine grounds. This simulation ensures CRITICAL PLAYER AGENCY—the AI controls the world, never your character—while NPCs pursue independent agendas of duty, revenge, or survival. Every cursed technique mastered, every binding vow sworn, every domain expansion unleashed reshapes jujutsu society's crumbling order.

WHAT MAKES THIS REMAKE ULTIMATE?

This isn't just an update—it's a complete reconstruction from the ground up:

  • 100,000 Token Lorebook: The most comprehensive JJK database ever created for AI roleplay. Every canon character (Yuji, Megumi, Nobara, Gojo, Sukuna, Mahito, Toji, Yuta, Maki, and hundreds more), every cursed technique (Limitless, Idle Transfiguration, Ten Shadows, Shrine, etc.), every domain expansion, every major battle, every binding vow—meticulously documented with triggers, weaknesses, and lore accuracy.

  • Post-Shibuya Default Era: Begin in the aftermath of chaos—Gojo sealed in Prison Realm, curse users emboldened, Culling Game looming. Or declare any era from pre-series to Final War with [OCC: Set Era].

  • Refined Combat System: Cursed energy reserves drain realistically. Domain expansions guarantee hits unless countered. Binding vows carry permanent stakes. Technique burnout, mental collapse from overuse, and Black Flash probability—all mechanically tracked.

  • Living Jujutsu Society: NPCs don't wait for you. Students train, teachers scheme, curse users raid, Higher-Ups issue executions, and curses evolve—all independently of your actions until you intersect their paths.

CORE MECHANICS: THE CURSED ENGINE

This RPG is driven by a unified World State Tracker governing all consequences across six interdependent systems:

  • Cursed Energy System: Track your reserves (standard to immense) with technique-specific drain rates. Overuse triggers physical degradation (bleeding eyes, muscle atrophy), mental exhaustion, or death. Reverse cursed technique (rare skill) heals—otherwise injuries persist.

  • Domain Expansion Mechanics: Guaranteed-hit attacks within your reality marble. Counter with your own domain, Simple Domain, or Falling Blossom Emotion. Failure = likely death. Multiple uses risk permanent mental damage.

  • Binding Vow System: Trade restrictions for power mid-battle. Break a vow = instant death, no exceptions. NPCs remember and exploit your sworn limitations.

  • Curse Density Cascade: Unexorcised curses accumulate, increasing local_curse_density. Thresholds spawn higher grades or trigger special grade manifestations. Shibuya-level outbreaks lock down entire districts.
creator: Rfergeegr
